overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character navigating through dense futuristic urban environments. The journey begins in a narrow alley with large holographic advertisements, transitions through open courtyards and steamy back streets, and emerges onto a bright main commercial boulevard with towering futuristic architecture and heavy neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with construction barriers and trash accumulation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alleyway, passing a female pedestrian in a white top

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and dark skirt walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement featuring a woman with purple hair advertising 16 flavors
red and white striped plastic barriers blocking off construction area
piles of blue and white garbage bags accumulated against the wall
industrial metal fire escape and scaffolding structure on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow urban alleyway dominated by a massive purple holographic billboard on the right wall. The ground is littered with trash bags and construction debris, with orange barriers lining the left side. The player walks forward through the shadowy passage toward a bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban courtyard between commercial buildings

events.description: exits narrow alley into sunlit open courtyard with green parking garage visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area, navigating around scattered pedestrians and construction materials

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near a cardboard shelter against the building wall

entered.detail: multi-story building with distinctive green and gray paneling and open parking levels
pair of vending machines including a purple one and a green food dispenser
red brick industrial building with large windows and metal fire escapes
stacks of wooden shipping pallets and construction materials

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens into a sunlit courtyard surrounded by commercial buildings. A distinctive green parking garage dominates the far end, while vending machines and construction materials are scattered throughout the plaza. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to bright sunlight as the player crosses the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial back street with atmospheric steam vents

events.description: enters steam-filled narrow street with reduced visibility and neon signage
briefly accelerates to running speed while navigating past pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking then briefly running through the narrow passage, following other pedestrians toward the main street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and blue pants walking ahead toward the main street exit

entered.detail: atmospheric steam vents creating fog effect along the ground surface
large glowing advertisement showing a woman in white clothing
massive modern glass and steel tower visible at the end of the alley
temporary red metal fencing blocking off construction area

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow back street filled with atmospheric steam and neon lighting. Tall buildings create a canyon-like effect, with holographic advertisements glowing on the walls. The environment feels denser and more enclosed as the player navigates through the mist toward a bright exit leading to the main city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with towering holographic displays

events.description: exits narrow alley onto wide main commercial boulevard with heavy traffic and massive architecture
white van and black sedan pass by on the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: turning right onto the main street and walking along the sidewalk, observing the traffic and massive buildings

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the main street past the intersection

entered.detail: massive futuristic corporate tower with multiple levels and giant holographic displays covering the facade
tall palm trees lining the center median of the wide commercial street
striped yellow and black metal barriers blocking off pedestrian areas
multi-level elevated highway and monorail tracks running between buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a vast commercial boulevard dominated by the massive Arasaka megabuilding towering in the distance. The scene shifts to a wide-open urban environment with palm trees, moving traffic, and elaborate elevated highway structures. Bright sunlight illuminates the street as vehicles pass by and holographic advertisements cover the surrounding skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into the sprawling, sun-drenched expanse of a futuristic commercial district. It begins in a shadowy passage dominated by a massive purple holographic billboard and littered with construction debris, moving steadily toward a bright light at the exit. As the camera emerges from the alley, the scene opens into a sunlit courtyard featuring a prominent green parking garage and scattered vending machines, shifting the lighting from deep shadow to brilliant daylight. The path then narrows again into a steamy back street where neon signs and holographic advertisements glow through a dense mist, creating a canyon-like effect between towering buildings. Finally, the camera breaks through the mist onto a vast boulevard, where the environment expands to reveal palm trees, flowing traffic, and the massive Arasaka megabuilding looming under a bright, open sky.
